name: Grade 1 Physical Education — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

units.title: Investigate: locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to locomotor skills, pathways, balance, and safe movement choices.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
